name: motion
description: A plugin that provides comprehensive documentation and examples for using the Motion library, including animation techniques, API endpoints, request/response formats, and best practices.

interface.shortDescription: Access comprehensive documentation and examples for using the Motion library.
interface.longDescription: The Motion Docs plugin provides detailed documentation and practical examples for leveraging the Motion library effectively, covering animation techniques, API endpoints, request/response formats, and best practices.
defaultPrompt: Use the motion plugin to access comprehensive documentation and examples for using the Motion library.
Use the motion plugin to understand the animation techniques for the Motion library.
Use the motion plugin to explore the available API endpoints and their usage.
